headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -105.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 48% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 164 quotes and an unusually high proportion of strong-intensity posts (139 out of 164), driving the score to 79.9 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 166-day range, though still well below the all-time peak of 169.0.
• Optimism dropped sharply from -9.0 to -52.0, nearing its historical low of -65.5, while Fears held steady and unremarkable.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
